leadText: Calm Mind (Japanese: めいそう Meditation) is a non-damaging Psychic-type move introduced in Generation III. It is: TM04 from Generation III to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM33 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR49 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM129 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM006 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Calm Mind raises the user's Special Attack and Special Defense stats by one stage each. Calm Mind can be used as the first move of a Pokémon Contest combination , causing Confusion , Dream Eater , Future Sight , Light Screen , Luster Purge , Meditate , Mist Ball , Psybeam , Psychic , Psycho Boost , Psywave , and Reflect to score double the normal appeal if used in the next turn. It can also be used as part of a Contest Spectacular combination, causing Baton Pass and Stored Power to give user an extra three appeal points if they are used in the next turn. If powered up by Psychium Z , all of the user's lowered stats are reset. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Calm Mind's PP has been reduced to 10, and it raises the user's offensive and defensive stats for four turns. sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Colo XD Raises Sp. Atk and Sp. Def by focusing the mind. FR LG The user focuses its mind to raise the Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats. D P Pt HG SS PBR B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to raise its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats. LA The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to raise its offensive and defensive stats. S V The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to boost its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats. ZA The user boosts its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats for a short time by quietly focusing its mind and calming its spirit.
